subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen maketh mention of him who remembereth his Ancient Lord, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of God in such wise that no sorrow shall touch him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد یذکر القلم الاعلی من یذکر مولاه القدیم لیفرح بذکر الله علی شان لاتحزنه
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @House of Justice, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
